Hibernate: create table expenses ( amount numeric(19,2) not null, date date not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, description TEXT, title varchar(255) not null, category enum ('EDUCATION','ENTERTAINMENT','FOOD','HEALTH','OTHER','SHOPPING','TRANSPORT','UTILITIES') not null, payment_method enum ('CARD','CASH','NETBANKING','UPI') not null, primary key (id) testcase.name: byKeyword_matchesTitle_caseInsensitive
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 where lower(e1_0.title) like ? escape '' or lower(e1_0.description) like ? escape ''

testcase.name: byKeyword_matchesDescription
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 where lower(e1_0.title) like ? escape '' or lower(e1_0.description) like ? escape ''

testcase.name: byPaymentMethod_upi_returnsSingleRow
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 where e1_0.payment_method=?

testcase.name: byDateRange_bothBounds_inclusiveMatch
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 where e1_0.date between ? and ?

testcase.name: emptyFilter_returnsAllRows
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0

testcase.name: byCategory_food_returnsTwoMatchingRows
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 where e1_0.category=?

testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 where e1_0.amount between ? and ?

testcase.name: byAmountRange_onlyMin_returnsAtLeastMin
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 where e1_0.amount>=?

testcase.name: byDateRange_onlyFrom_returnsOnOrAfter
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 where e1_0.date>=?

testcase.name: byAmountRange_onlyMax_returnsAtMostMax
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 where e1_0.amount<=?

testcase.name: combined_categoryAndMinAmount_returnsIntersection
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into expenses (amount, category, created_at, date, description, payment_method, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.amount, e1_0.category, e1_0.created_at, e1_0.date, e1_0.description, e1_0.payment_method, e1_0.title from expenses e1_0 where e1_0.category=? and e1_0.amount>=?
